Packages

Premade Web Development Packages

*All Prices are for Development Only. Hosting, Domain and Other Fees Not Included.

**Pricing shown is for typical projects. Final quotes depend on project requirements.

Starter (R2 500)

  • Modern, Mobile-friendly Single-Page Website
  • Email Contact Form and WhatsApp integration
  • Google Search Console Setup
  • Help customers find your business on Google
  • Social Media Links
  • One Revision Round

Business (R5 000)

  • Upto 5 Pages
  • Professional Business Email Setup
  • 2 Revision Rounds
  • All Features of Starter

Custom (From R7 000)

  • Full Scale Web Apps
  • Online Stores and Dashboards
  • Third Party Integrations
  • Custom Systems Built For Your Business

Projects

What have I done before?

Automated Staff Hours & Claim Management

Monthly Claim System

A centralized workflow portal built to completely streamline internal administration. Independent contractors can digitally log their active hours, attach supporting documents, and submit monthly claims directly through the system.

Team Collaboration Hub

FileSec

A private, secure digital space that natively merges file management with instant communication. Instead of downloading a document from one app to discuss it on another, teams can upload assets directly into dedicated client channels.

Mobile Budgeting Platform

Goblin Pouch

An interactive, consumer-facing mobile application designed to simplify financial management for individuals and groups. The app features secure personal account creation, real-time receipt uploads, and highly collaborative shared group dashboards.

More Projects Can Be Found On My Personal Portfolio Here
